content:
whoami # IT Infrastructure & Cybersecurity Professional
With nearly a decade of experience managing highly available critical systems, my focus lies in network defense, SOC analysis, and deploying robust security controls.
Currently architecting enterprise-grade virtualized labs on Linux, hunting vulnerabilities, and driving security initiatives.
Core: Incident Management, SIEM (Splunk), Network Troubleshooting, LGPD/GDPR. Infrastructure: Linux (Fedora/Bazzite), Windows Server, Azure Cloud, Docker/Podman. Languages: English (C2), Japanese (N4), Portuguese (Native). Type ./labs_and_writeups in the menu above to see my latest CTF and Home Lab deployments, or open resume.txt to view my full background.

CURRICULUM VITAE # PERSONAL DETAILS
Name Felipe Alves Sarmento Pires Address Niterói, Brazil Phone +55 21 92000-2049 E-mail felipeasp@live.it Links LinkedIn | Credly PROFILE
Summary IT Infrastructure and Cybersecurity professional with ~10 years of experience managing highly available critical systems. Expert in network troubleshooting, incident management, and deploying security controls. Leveraging robust background, GRC specializations, and hands-on SOC training to drive security initiatives and protect data integrity. WORK EXPERIENCE
04/2026 – Present Independent Security Analyst Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Home Lab * Built a Bazzite Linux virtual lab for continuous enterprise network defense training. * Deployed Splunk SIEM in a VM for log analysis and custom Tier 1 SOC threat alerts. * Performed Wireshark deep packet inspection and configured firewall/network segmentation for system hardening. 10/2016 – 04/2026 Head of IT System Support Section Public Hospital, IT Department * Managed SLA and high-availability for critical PACS/RIS systems via proactive monitoring, minimizing downtime. * Mitigated network failures and led rapid incident response across the hospital’s infrastructure. * Executed disaster recovery and daily backup validations to ensure data integrity and patient privacy. EDUCATION
03/2026 – 05/2027 Postgraduate in Risk Management and Cybersecurity (Expected) Faculdade Focus 09/2025 – 02/2026 Postgraduate in Digital Law, LGPD, and Data Protection Practice Faculdade 19 Educação 01/2020 – 12/2022 Technologist Degree in Systems Analysis and Development Centro Universitário Estácio de Ribeirão Preto SKILLS & COMPETENCIES
IT & Infra Cybersecurity & GRC: SOC Analysis, Ethical Hacking (CTF), Incident Management, LGPD/GDPR, SIEM (Splunk). Infrastructure: Linux (Fedora, Bazzite), Windows Server, Azure Cloud, Docker/Podman. Networking: Wireshark, Firewalls, PACS/RIS. Languages Portuguese: Native English: Proficient (C2) - EF SET 75/100 Japanese: Intermediate (JLPT N4) Spanish: B2 French / German: A1
